full_text:
Liu Mi 劉彌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Mi (劉彌)was born in Changsha. Liu Feng’s guardian, he met Liu Bei after the latter had defeated Cao Ren. Liu Mi may not have existed in history. Liu Mi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
